info.title: FlowFic API
info.description: OpenAPI spec generated from route handlers in src/app/api and supabase/functions for import into Apidog.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free text query. Server trims to 120 chars.

patch.summary: Mark one notification or all notifications as read

get.summary: List available sound files from public/sound and public/sounds

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Empty query returns an empty result set.

post.summary: Create Stripe checkout session from Next API
post.description: Requires a Supabase access token. This Next.js route supports card checkout and VIP subscription. PromptPay is only available on the Supabase Edge Function /stripe-checkout.

post.summary: Handle Stripe webhook on Next API
post.description: Send the raw Stripe event body with the stripe-signature header intact. The handler rejects unsigned or mutated payloads.

get.summary: List users for finance admin tools
Check whether current user can use finance admin routes
Fetch payment case history and related coin transactions

post.summary: Top up coins to a selected user
Reverse a positive stripe top-up transaction as a refund
Apply a chargeback hold to a user's coin balance
Release a previously applied chargeback hold

example.reason: Chargeback dispute closed in our favor

post.summary: Run payment reconciliation manually as an admin

get.summary: Run scheduled daily reconciliation via GET

post.summary: Run scheduled daily reconciliation via POST

get.summary: Run creator revenue settlement via GET

post.summary: Run creator revenue settlement via POST
Create Stripe checkout session from Supabase Edge Function
post.description: Supports card and PromptPay for coin top-up. VIP still uses card/subscription flow.

post.summary: Handle Stripe webhook on Supabase Edge Function

get.summary: Fetch creator earnings summary for current writer

post.summary: Create or update writer payout profile
Submit payout request for current writer

SupabaseBearerAuth.description: Supabase access token in the Authorization header.

CronBearerAuth.description: CRON_SECRET in the Authorization header for internal cron-protected finance endpoints.

StripeSignature.name: stripe-signature
StripeSignature.description: Stripe webhook signature over the raw request body.
